sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57307" key="kibdh/leuma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κιβδήλ-ευμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n57307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an adulteration</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg034.perseus-grc1:917e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">917e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
